introSection: Tentomushi is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Tobu Zoo Park in Minami, Saitamai, Japan. Tentomushi is Japanese for Ladybug.

sections.title: History
sections.content: In or before 2025, Tobu Zoo worked with the original manufacturer Zierer to replace the roller coaster's train.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Tentomushi is a Tivoli Medium coaster from Zierer.

fullText:
Tentomushi is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Tobu Zoo Park in Minami, Saitamai, Japan. Tentomushi is Japanese for Ladybug.

In or before 2025, Tobu Zoo worked with the original manufacturer Zierer to replace the roller coaster's train.

Tentomushi is a Tivoli Medium coaster from Zierer.
